routes.name: CsInH3
existing_evidence: Repo-local Tc = 214 K at 3 GPa after SSCHA
Strongest low-pressure hydride benchmark in the repo
missing_evidence: Retained ambient superconductivity after pressure release
routes.reason: Fails the ambient branch because P_op remains 3 GPa and fails the quench branch because ambient retention is unsupported and Phase 07 is already negative.

routes.name: RbPH3
existing_evidence: Primary-source theory predicts about 100 K at ambient pressure
missing_evidence: Repo-local 0-5 GPa thermodynamic and dynamic checkpoints
Direct experiment or equivalent retention evidence
routes.reason: Looks viable in theory for the ambient branch but does not satisfy the shared high-fidelity gate.

routes.name: KB3C3
existing_evidence: Carried ambient framework benchmark around 102.5 K
Useful non-hydride analog for pressure history and framework stabilization
routes.reason: The ambient benchmark remains theory-dominant and outside the hydride-route success criteria for this milestone.

ambient_branch.result: no route passes under the shared high-fidelity gate

pressure_quench_branch.result: no hydride-side route passes; HgBa2Ca2Cu3O8+delta is an external benchmark only

handoff.required_action: Emit a single final milestone decision consistent with the fail/blocked/benchmark-only verdicts.
